query:
SELECT 
  id,
  section,
  entity,
  status,
  progress,
  current_stage,
  records_synced,
  triggered_by,
  DATE_FORMAT(started_at, '%H:%i:%s') AS started,
  DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%H:%i:%s') AS updated
FROM sync_logs
WHERE section IN ('Boonphone', 'boonphone')
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
